title: Senior Social Worker, Families for Life @ Community, ComLink (1 Year Contract)
description:
COMPANY DESCRIPTION

Founded in 1978 as Singapore's first family service centre, Allkin Singapore is a community-centric social service agency that believes everyone has the potential to create positive change, regardless of age, race, or background.

Through our service offerings, strategic partnerships, and community initiatives, we unlock opportunities for vulnerable individuals and families to overcome life's challenges, build a brighter future, and inspire others to do the same.

This is a 1 year contract.

RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Assist in the planning, development, evaluation and implementation of family-related programmes
  • Conduct information & referral, home visits and work collaboratively with stakeholders / community partners
  • Deliver evidence-based parenting talks, workshops, programmes and family events for parents and grandparents.
  • Support outreach and engagement efforts with stakeholders such as family coaches, school leaders, educators, community partners, and religious organisations to promote family life education.
  • Conduct thorough needs and risk assessments, provide expert consultations, and support holistic case management.
  • Lead case conferences and supervise intervention plans
  • Maintain accurate casework documentation, approve case assessments, and co-lead reviews of complex cases.
  • Mobilise resources and volunteers to design and implement community development initiatives
  • Ensure adherence to ethical standards, guide systemic service delivery, and manage critical incidents.
  • Support clinical competency development and lead organizational projects.
  • Willing to work flexible hours, including weeknights and weekends.
QUALIFICATIONS
  • Bachelor/Postgraduate Diploma/Master in Social Work.
  • Be a registered Social Worker or Counsellor.
  • Minimum 6 years in social work with a focus on casework, counselling, group work, and community work.
  • At least 5 years of relevant experience in family life education (e.g., parenting or marriage counselling or groupwork facilitation).
  • Preferably trained and accredited in:
    • Triple P (Positive Parenting Program) Level 2 and 3 (Applicants without these certifications should be open to attending the relevant training.)
  • Confident in delivering seminars and facilitating groupwork for large group of adult audience
  • Proficient in English; ability to speak Mandarin, Malay, or Tamil is an advantage.
  • Strong interpersonal, communication, writing, organizational and teamwork skills.
  • Strong analytical and problem-solving skills
  • Excellent clinical and supervision skills, and effective leadership.
  • Passionate about supporting families, especially parents/grandparents/caregivers.
OTHER INFORMATION

Liberte HR Services Pte Ltd is the designated recruitment partner for Allkin Singapore. As part of the hiring process, you may receive communication from them regarding this opportunity. #LI-DNI

Please note that your application will be sent to and reviewed by the direct employer - Allkin Singapore Ltd
